task_completion.description: Open Wondershare EdrawMax and create a new diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application window is open, displaying a blank or in-progress canvas.

task_completion.description: Add and connect shapes for the grandparents (Arthur, Ruth) and parents (John, Mary) with their ages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes representing Arthur (78), Ruth (80), John (55), and Mary (52) are visible on the canvas, with lines indicating their family relationships (marriage and descent).

task_completion.description: Add and connect shapes for the children (Sarah, Mike) with their ages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes representing Sarah (28) and Mike (25) are visible on the canvas and are connected as children to John and Mary.
The text 'Heart Disease' is explicitly written on, inside, or immediately next to the shape representing John.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as medical_genogram.eddx in the Diagrams folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'medical_genogram.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory, or the EdrawMax title bar/tab shows this filename.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as medical_genogram.png in the Diagrams folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog shows the file being saved as 'medical_genogram.png' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory, or a file manager window shows the newly created .png file in that folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and the canvas, rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts, echo commands, or file manipulation commands creating the .eddx or .png files directly.

integrity.description: The diagram was genuinely constructed using shapes and text tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas shows individual selectable shapes and text boxes being placed and edited, rather than an imported static image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are exactly '/home/ga/Diagrams/medical_genogram.eddx' and '/home/ga/Diagrams/medical_genogram.png'. The diagram must contain the following exact text labels: 'Arthur', 'Ruth', 'John', 'Mary', 'Sarah', 'Mike', '78', '80', '55', '52', '28', '25', and 'Heart Disease'.
